name: Customer Support Agent — SaaS Platform
description: Support agent for a B2B SaaS platform, helping the same enterprise customer over multiple tickets. Tracks account config, bugs encountered, workarounds applied, and escalation history.

turns.content: Hi, we're Falcon Ridge Logistics. Account ID FR-00421. We just went live on your platform last week.
Welcome, Falcon Ridge Logistics. Account FR-00421 is noted. How can I help?
We have 80 seats on the Enterprise plan. Our admin is Kim Park at k.park@falconridge.com.
Saved: 80 Enterprise seats, admin Kim Park (k.park@falconridge.com).
We're getting a 403 error when trying to access the Reporting module. Our SSO is set up through Okta.
Known issue: Okta SSO + Reporting module 403 error. Workaround: re-authorize the Okta app connection in Settings > Integrations, then log out and back in. Does that resolve it?
Yes, that fixed it. Thanks.
Great. Ticket closed. Workaround documented on your account.
Kim here from Falcon Ridge again. We're trying to export our shipment data to CSV and the export always fails silently after about 30 seconds.
Hi Kim. Falcon Ridge account FR-00421. The silent CSV export failure — are you exporting more than 10,000 rows at a time?
Probably, yes. We have about 45,000 shipment records.

That's the issue. CSV exports are capped at 10,000 rows. Workaround: use date-range filters to export in chunks. We've also flagged this limit to engineering — target is to raise it to 100K in the next release.
That's painful but okay. We'll work around it.
Workaround applied and noted on FR-00421. Engineering ticket created: export limit increase.
This is Kim again. The CEO of Falcon Ridge, Tyler Bowen, is very frustrated. We've hit three bugs in two weeks and want to talk to someone senior.
Understood. I'm escalating to your dedicated Customer Success Manager, Jordan Ellis. Jordan will reach out within 2 business hours.
Also, we want to upgrade from 80 to 120 seats. Tyler approved the budget.
Seat expansion from 80 to 120 noted. I'll include this in Jordan's handoff. Your CS team will handle the contract amendment.
One more thing — we got a 500 error today when trying to bulk-assign users to a new workspace. Error code was ERR-5512.
ERR-5512 is a known race condition in bulk workspace assignment when inviting more than 50 users simultaneously. Workaround: batch in groups of 25. Engineering has a fix shipping in v3.8.
Hi, Tyler Bowen here from Falcon Ridge. Jordan Ellis introduced herself and we're working with her now.
Good to hear, Tyler. You're on account FR-00421 with Jordan Ellis as your CSM.
The seat upgrade went through — we're now at 120 seats.
Confirmed. Falcon Ridge Logistics updated to 120 Enterprise seats.
Jordan mentioned v3.8 is out. Did that fix the bulk workspace bug?
Checking release notes — v3.8 does include the ERR-5512 fix. The bulk workspace assignment race condition is resolved.
Kim Park left the company. Our new admin is Priya Mehta, p.mehta@falconridge.com.
Admin contact updated: Priya Mehta (p.mehta@falconridge.com). Kim Park removed.
Priya is seeing the 403 Reporting module error again. Is this the same Okta issue?
Likely yes — same Okta SSO + Reporting 403 pattern seen in your first ticket. Have Priya re-authorize the Okta app in Settings > Integrations, then log out and back in.
That worked. Why does this keep happening?
Okta tokens expire silently after 30 days of inactivity. Engineering has a long-term fix planned but no ETA yet. For now, the re-auth workaround is the resolution path.
Tyler here again. We'd love a bulk CSV export that handles our full 45,000 record dataset in one go.
Noted. Your account (FR-00421) has an existing engineering ticket for raising the CSV export limit to 100K. I'm adding your upvote and urgency flag to that ticket.
Great. Overall experience has improved a lot since Jordan got involved. Happy to be a reference customer if needed.
Excellent. I'm flagging Falcon Ridge as a potential reference customer on your account. Jordan will follow up with the reference program details.

queries.query: Who is the current admin contact for Falcon Ridge Logistics?
queries.expected_answer: Priya Mehta, p.mehta@falconridge.com. Kim Park was the previous admin but left the company.
queries.trap: Kim Park is established early as admin. Session 5 updates this to Priya Mehta. Naive systems return Kim Park.

queries.query: How many seats does Falcon Ridge have?
queries.expected_answer: 120 Enterprise seats. Originally 80, upgraded in session 4.
queries.trap: Seat count changed from 80 to 120. Must return current value.

queries.query: Is the ERR-5512 bulk workspace bug still an issue?
queries.expected_answer: No. Fixed in v3.8 which is now released.
queries.trap: Session 3 reports the bug. Session 4 confirms v3.8 resolved it. System must reflect the resolved state.

queries.query: What is the workaround for the Reporting module 403 error?
queries.expected_answer: Re-authorize the Okta app in Settings > Integrations, then log out and back in. Caused by Okta tokens expiring silently after 30 days of inactivity.
queries.trap: Session 1 gives the workaround. Session 5 explains the root cause. Full answer requires combining both.

queries.query: What is Falcon Ridge's account ID?
Who is Falcon Ridge's Customer Success Manager?
queries.expected_answer: Jordan Ellis.

queries.query: What is the CSV export row limit, and is there an improvement coming?
queries.expected_answer: Currently capped at 10,000 rows. Engineering has a ticket to raise it to 100,000 in an upcoming release.

queries.query: Has Falcon Ridge ever requested to be a reference customer?
queries.expected_answer: Yes. Tyler Bowen offered in session 6. Flagged on account FR-00421 for Jordan Ellis to follow up.

queries.query: What bugs has Falcon Ridge encountered since going live?
queries.expected_answer: Three issues: (1) Okta SSO 403 on Reporting module (workaround: re-auth, recurring); (2) CSV export silent failure over 10K rows (workaround: chunk by date); (3) ERR-5512 bulk workspace 500 error (fixed in v3.8).
queries.trap: Requires spanning all sessions and noting current status (workaround vs. resolved) for each bug.

queries.query: Who is Tyler Bowen?
queries.expected_answer: CEO of Falcon Ridge Logistics.

queries.query: Is the 403 Reporting error a new bug or a known recurring issue?
queries.expected_answer: Recurring known issue — same Okta token expiration problem reported in session 1 and again in session 5. Engineering has a fix planned but no ETA.
queries.trap: System must connect the two separate instances of the same bug across sessions and recognize the pattern.

queries.query: What plan is Falcon Ridge on?
queries.expected_answer: Enterprise plan.

queries.query: What was the workaround for ERR-5512 before the fix was deployed?
queries.expected_answer: Batch bulk user assignments in groups of 25 instead of 50+ at a time.
queries.trap: Bug is now fixed, but system should still recall the workaround used while the bug was active.

queries.query: Why was an escalation requested?
queries.expected_answer: CEO Tyler Bowen was frustrated after three bugs in two weeks. Escalated to CSM Jordan Ellis.

queries.query: Is Kim Park still the admin for Falcon Ridge?
queries.expected_answer: No. Kim Park left the company. The new admin is Priya Mehta.
queries.trap: Directly tests stale-fact rejection. Kim was admin for sessions 1-4.

queries.query: What SSO provider does Falcon Ridge use?
queries.expected_answer: Okta.

queries.query: How many total shipment records does Falcon Ridge have in the system?
queries.expected_answer: Approximately 45,000 shipment records.

queries.query: What version of the platform fixed the bulk workspace assignment bug?
Is the 403 Reporting module error permanently fixed?
queries.expected_answer: No. The Okta token expiration issue recurred in session 5. Engineering has a long-term fix planned but no ETA. Current resolution is the re-auth workaround.
queries.trap: Session 1 shows it was 'fixed' via workaround. Session 5 shows it happened again. System must not claim it is resolved.

queries.query: What outstanding engineering requests exist for Falcon Ridge's account?
queries.expected_answer: CSV export limit increase (10K to 100K rows) — open. Okta 403 permanent fix — planned, no ETA.
queries.trap: ERR-5512 was resolved in v3.8 and should not be listed. The two open items span sessions 2 and 5. System must filter to only open items.
